title: Corporate Loan Agreement Generator
lead: A massive architectural shift cutting manual contract drafting time by 90%.
overview: Designed and deployed a fully autonomous reporting and drafting tool specifically for corporate banking. This system unified fragmented data sets into a single click-to-print operation.
challenge: Relationship Managers were spending up to 4 hours manually typing data across 15 different compliance forms, leading to severe data entry errors and audit failures.
solution: Built an advanced VBA mapping architecture that scraped internal databases, cross-verified client details, and automatically populated 100% compliant legal documents in under 2 seconds.

title: Enterprise Network Core Overhaul
lead: Upgrading legacy routing systems to support modern high-speed enterprise demands.
overview: Led the complete teardown and replacement of the hotel's central data routing infrastructure, ensuring zero downtime for critical guest services.
challenge: The legacy network was bottlenecking under the load of new digital guest amenities, causing daily crashes and severe lag in the financial processing terminals.
solution: Deployed top-tier Cisco CCNA-level routing topologies. Segmented administrative, guest, and financial traffic into secure, dedicated VLANs resulting in 99.9% uptime.
